transcribeResultView.noResult: No transcript result is available for this job.
transcribeResultView.noTranscriptGenerated: No transcript could be generated for this file.
transcribeResultView.analysisRunning: Running summary and safety review in the background...
transcribeResultView.summaryPending: Summary and safety review will appear here once the analysis job finishes.

specializedToolShell.selectHint: or click to select from your computer. Files stay on our servers for at most 24 hours and are then deleted.
specializedToolShell.jobFailed: Job failed. Try a different file or refresh.
specializedToolShell.toggleHint: Toggle between the original input and the finalized result.
specializedToolShell.zipPreviewTitle: Preview not available for ZIP downloads
specializedToolShell.zipPreviewBody: This result is packaged as a ZIP archive. Download it and extract locally to view the contents.

embeddedToolPanel.dragDrop: Drag and drop a {{kind}} file here
embeddedToolPanel.selectHint: or click to select from your computer. Files stay on our servers for at most 24 hours and are then deleted.
embeddedToolPanel.tryAgainOrOpen: Try again or open the full converter.
embeddedToolPanel.needFullSuffix: — it includes the conversion history, transcript flow, and AI tools.

extractAudio.title: Extract audio
extractAudio.subtitle: Pull the audio track out of a video file and save it as MP3, WAV, AAC, OGG, or FLAC.
extractAudio.success: Audio extracted. Use the download button to save it.
extractAudio.note: The extracted track keeps the source's full duration and quality. Videos with no audio will return a clear error.

extractVideoOnly.title: Extract video (no audio)
extractVideoOnly.subtitle: Strip the audio track from a video file, keeping only the video stream.
extractVideoOnly.note: The video stream is stream-copied wherever possible — no quality loss. We re-encode only if the destination container needs it.

extractFrames.title: Extract frames
extractFrames.subtitle: Save individual frames from a video as PNG, JPG, or WebP images.
extractFrames.zipNote: Frames are bundled into a single ZIP for download. We cap the count to keep jobs fast and predictable; raise the limit if you really need more.
extractFrames.success: Frames extracted. Download the ZIP below.

captionTranslator.title: Translate captions
captionTranslator.subtitle: Upload a VTT, SRT, or TXT caption file and translate it to another language.
captionTranslator.privacyNote: Files are processed on our own server and deleted within 24 hours. We do not send your captions to third-party AI providers.
captionTranslator.timingNote: Cue timing and ordering are preserved exactly — only the cue text is translated.
captionTranslator.translationFailed: Translation failed. Try a smaller file or a different target language.

stitchAudioToVideo.title: Stitch audio onto a video
stitchAudioToVideo.subtitle: Add or replace audio tracks on a video file.
stitchAudioToVideo.intro: Pick the video first — you'll add audio tracks (voiceover, music, narration) next.
stitchAudioToVideo.loopTrack: Loop this track to match the video length
stitchAudioToVideo.stitchFailed: Stitch failed. Check that your audio files are valid and try again.

aiVideoTools.title: AI Video Tools
aiVideoTools.tooltipIntro: AI Video Tools currently includes AI Frame Interpolation, which generates new in-between frames so motion plays back more smoothly.
aiVideoTools.tooltipBestFor: Best for taking 24/30fps footage up to 60fps or 60fps up to 120fps. This is GPU-heavy and currently always outputs MP4.
aiVideoTools.intro: AI frame interpolation creates in-between frames for smoother motion. Best for 24/30fps → 60fps or 60fps → 120fps clips.
aiVideoTools.gpuNote: This is GPU-heavy and currently outputs MP4. For long or 4K videos, use a lower max processing height first. This is different from basic FPS conversion — AI interpolation synthesizes new frames rather than duplicating them, and bypasses most other visual / temporal filters in v1.

frameInterpolation.preserveAudio: Preserve audio track from the source

notes.mp4: Output is always MP4 (H.264 + AAC) in v1.
notes.trim: Trim is disabled with AI frame interpolation in v1 — trim the clip separately first if needed.
notes.artifacts: Fast motion, scene cuts, hair, hands, wheels, and occlusions can show interpolation artifacts. Preview before publishing.

point.label: Point
point.description: A single dot per sample — clean and minimal.

line.label: Line
line.description: A vertical bar per sample — bolder presence.

p2p.label: Point to point
p2p.description: A dot per sample plus connecting lines — flowing look.

cline.label: Centered line
cline.description: Vertical line centered on the axis — symmetrical look.

audioWaveformPanel.bothNote: Both outputs will be packaged into a single .zip you can download in one click.
audioWaveformPanel.includeAudio: Include original audio with generated waveform video
audioWaveformPanel.includeAudioNote: The waveform video will play in sync with the source audio — perfect for audiograms, music previews, and podcast clips. Turn off for a silent waveform.
audioWaveformPanel.renderModeNote: Render mode applies to the waveform video. Image output uses a still-frame renderer that ignores the mode setting.
audioWaveformPanel.frameRateNote: Choose either the output frame rate or the number of audio samples drawn per column. Not both.
audioWaveformPanel.splitChannels: Split stereo channels (draw left and right separately)

scaleOptions.log: log — makes quiet parts more visible
scaleOptions.sqrt: sqrt — gentle boost to quiet parts
scaleOptions.cbrt: cbrt — stronger boost to quiet parts
